column1: # Sample glossary: common English UI labels -> Japanese
# Format: source<TAB>translation  (omit the second column to keep the term as-is)
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored. Matching is case-sensitive.
# When a whole segment equals a glossary source, the mapping is applied directly
# and the model is skipped — this keeps short nav/heading labels from being
# translated literally (e.g. the heading "About" becoming "について").
